title: Broadcast Desk Update 001: Production Check-In
summary: Students review a teacher-created production check-in and submit the required response or media evidence.
studentInstructions: Read the update, confirm what production evidence is required, and submit the requested response, link, file, or notes.
submissionRequirements: Media file, link, or production response
teacherNotes: Replace this draft with the current production check-in, real classroom instructions, and teacher-approved resource links before use.
